title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays and strategizes in Factorio, a factory-building game, demonstrating the model's ability to plan and execute complex sequential tasks without human intervention.
writeup: This video shows Claude Fable 5 autonomously playing Factorio, a factory-building game, without human intervention. It serves as a demonstration of the model acting as an agent: strategizing, planning, and executing complex tasks in a real-time game environment. The key takeaway is the model's long-horizon planning and problem-solving, applied to managing game states and building a factory on its own.
